# Flash Trade MCP Server

> MCP server for Flash Trade perpetual DEX on Solana. Provides AI agents with tools to read market data, preview trades, and build unsigned transactions for perpetual futures positions.

## Key Information

- Non-custodial: all transaction tools return unsigned base64 transactions for user signing
- Prices from Pyth Lazer oracles (mainnet only — devnet returns stale/zero)
- SOL positions use JitoSOL as underlying collateral on-chain
- Available markets: SOL, BTC, ETH, and others in Flash Trade pools

## Critical Rules

- COLLATERAL MINIMUM: Limit orders, take-profit (TP), and stop-loss (SL) require >$10 collateral AFTER entry fees. A $10 position has fees deducted, dropping collateral below $10 and preventing TP/SL/limit orders. Use at least $11-12 input amount.
- ALWAYS show the preview (entry price, fees, leverage, liquidation price) to the user before they sign any transaction.
- Position key (on-chain pubkey from get_positions) is required to close, add/remove collateral, or reverse a position.
- Default slippage is 0.5%. Increase for volatile markets or large positions.
- Degen mode must be explicitly enabled for leverage above normal limits.

## Order Types

- Market: executes immediately at oracle price + slippage. Any collateral amount.
- Limit: executes when price hits target. Requires >$10 collateral after fees.
- Take-Profit (TP): trigger order that closes position at profit target. Requires >$10 collateral after fees.
- Stop-Loss (SL): trigger order that closes position to limit loss. Requires >$10 collateral after fees.
- Up to 5 trigger orders (TP/SL) per position, each can close a different percentage.

## Read Tools

- [health_check]: Verify API connectivity
- [get_markets]: List all perpetual futures markets
- [get_market]: Get market details by pubkey
- [get_pools]: List liquidity pools
- [get_pool]: Get pool details by pubkey
- [get_custodies]: List custody accounts (token holdings per pool)
- [get_custody]: Get custody details by pubkey
- [get_prices]: Get current oracle prices for all assets
- [get_price]: Get price for one symbol (e.g. "SOL", "BTC")
- [get_positions]: List positions, optionally filtered by wallet owner (enriched with PnL)
- [get_position]: Get single position by pubkey
- [get_orders]: List orders (limit, TP, SL), optionally filtered by owner
- [get_order]: Get single order by pubkey
- [get_pool_data]: Get pool AUM, LP stats, utilization metrics

## Preview Tools (no transactions built)

- [preview_limit_order_fees]: Estimate fees, entry price, liq price for a limit order
- [preview_exit_fee]: Estimate exit fee and price for closing a position amount
- [preview_tp_sl]: Calculate TP/SL prices and projected PnL (forward, reverse_pnl, reverse_roi modes)
- [preview_margin]: Preview effect of adding/removing collateral on leverage and liq price

## Transaction Tools (return unsigned base64 transactions)

- [open_position]: Open new perpetual position (market or limit, with optional TP/SL). Params: input_token_symbol, output_token_symbol, input_amount, leverage, trade_type, owner
- [close_position]: Close or partially close a position. Params: position_key, input_usd, withdraw_token_symbol
- [add_collateral]: Add margin to reduce leverage. Params: position_key, deposit_amount, deposit_token_symbol, owner
- [remove_collateral]: Remove margin to increase leverage. Params: position_key, withdraw_amount_usd, withdraw_token_symbol, owner
- [reverse_position]: Close current position + open opposite direction in one transaction. Params: position_key, owner

## Trigger Order Tools (TP/SL management — return unsigned base64 transactions)

- [place_trigger_order]: Place a TP or SL on an existing position. Params: market_symbol, collateral_symbol, side, trigger_price, size_amount, is_stop_loss, owner
- [edit_trigger_order]: Edit an existing TP/SL order (change price, size). Params: market_symbol, collateral_symbol, side, order_id, trigger_price, size_amount, is_stop_loss, owner
- [cancel_trigger_order]: Cancel a single TP or SL order. Params: market_symbol, collateral_symbol, side, order_id, is_stop_loss, owner
- [cancel_all_trigger_orders]: Cancel ALL TP/SL orders for a market+side. Params: market_symbol, collateral_symbol, side, owner

## Typical Workflow

1. health_check → verify API
2. get_markets → discover markets
3. get_prices → check current prices
4. get_positions(owner) → check existing positions
5. open_position(input_amount="12.0") → build trade (use $12+ for TP/SL)
6. Show preview to user → user signs and submits
7. get_positions(owner) → verify position opened
8. place_trigger_order → add TP/SL to the position
9. get_orders(owner) → verify trigger orders placed

## Managing Trigger Orders

- Place: place_trigger_order with trigger_price and size_amount
- View: get_orders(owner) shows all limit/TP/SL orders with order_id
- Edit: edit_trigger_order with order_id from get_orders
- Cancel one: cancel_trigger_order with order_id
- Cancel all: cancel_all_trigger_orders for a market+side

## Configuration

- FLASH_API_URL: Flash Trade API base URL (required)
- FLASH_API_TIMEOUT: HTTP timeout in ms (default: 30000)
- WALLET_PUBKEY: Default wallet for transaction building (optional)

## Deployment

Currently runs as stdio transport (local process). Production deployment requires migration to Streamable HTTP transport on Cloudflare Workers or similar platform.

## Source

- [CLAUDE.md](./CLAUDE.md): Full architecture, domain knowledge, and tool catalog
- [Source Code](./src/): TypeScript, Bun runtime, @modelcontextprotocol/sdk
